name: ENLIVEX THERAP.LTD.IS-,01
summary: Enlivex Therapeutics Ltd. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing immunotherapy drugs for the treatment of life-threatening inflammatory and immune diseases. The company's lead product candidate is Allocetra, an investigational therapy for organ dysfunction and acute inflammatory conditions. Enlivex Therapeutics is headquartered in Ness Ziona, Israel.
